prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 2.0L Twin Spark (AR32301, 155hp) with a fully built **AR32301** featuring forged Mahle pistons (87.5mm, 11:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam rods, and a balanced crankshaft. Pair with a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbo (0.64 A/R turbine housing) and a **Tial 44mm wastegate** for 320hp at 1.5 bar boost, supported by a **Bosch 044 fuel pump** and **Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors**.

Drivetrain: Install a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** (Alfa 145/146-specific) with a **Spec Stage 3+ clutch** and a **lightweight aluminum flywheel** (11.5 lbs). Replace the stock driveshafts with **GKN CV joints** and **polyurethane differential mounts** (Powerflex 40mm).

Suspension & Handling: Fit **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (146 Ti-specific valving) with **Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear)**. Upgrade to **Brembo GT 330mm front brake kit** (4-piston calipers) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**. Use **OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (16x7.5 ET35)** wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (205/45/16)**.
estetica: Body: Install a **Zender 3000-style front lip** (146-specific) with **Carbonio rear diffuser** and **Alfa Romeo Sportiva side skirts**. Apply a **3M Matte Anthracite vinyl wrap** with **gloss black roof** and **carbon fiber mirror caps** (Seibon).

Interior: Replace stock seats with **Recaro SRD (Evo II) bucket seats** (Alfa 146-compatible mounts) and a **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (320mm, suede). Add a **Defi BF Advance gauge pod** (boost, oil temp, wideband) and **Schroth 4-point harnesses**.

Lighting: Convert to **Hella 500 Series projector headlights** (H4 bi-xenon) with **Philips D2S 85V bulbs** and **Morimoto LED angel eyes**. Install **RallyArt rear fog lights** (E-code, DOT-approved) and **VLEDS license plate LEDs**.
